title: Pedodontics Laboratory

Provides laboratory studies of removable or fixed appliances planned to be applied to the patient by pedodontic specialists.

It provides the opportunity and infrastructure for the repair and renewal of broken or deformed appliances.

It enables students to gain skills and access to professional knowledge through applied laboratory studies. With the pedodontics and orthodontics laboratory, students can improve their manipulation skills as well as learn the technical issues in the construction and application stages of orthodontic appliances and complete their clinical education.
